_meta.description: Competitive U.S. House district locations for the 2026 civic explainer. Locations sourced from Wikipedia state-level 2026 House election articles (current/2026 boundaries). Candidates left null until races settle.
_meta.source: Wikipedia 2026 US House elections by state; redrawn-state list from Ballotpedia, June 2026
_meta.redrawn_note: These states use different 2026 maps than 2024 (voluntary mid-decade redistricting, state law, or litigation). District geography may differ from prior boundaries.

PA-01.location: Northern suburbs of Philadelphia — all of Bucks County and parts of Montgomery County

PA-07.location: The Lehigh Valley — Lehigh, Northampton, and Carbon counties

PA-10.location: Harrisburg and York areas — all of Dauphin County, most of Cumberland County, northern York County

NY-01.location: Eastern Long Island — central and eastern Suffolk County

NY-03.location: North Shore of Nassau County and northeast Queens — Glen Cove, North Hempstead, parts of Oyster Bay, Whitestone, Little Neck, Douglaston

NY-04.location: South Shore of Nassau County — entirely within the town of Hempstead

NY-17.location: Lower Hudson Valley — Rockland, Putnam, and parts of Westchester and Dutchess counties

NY-19.location: Upper Hudson Valley across the Catskills to the Southern Tier and Finger Lakes — incl. Binghamton, Ithaca, Oneonta

CA-13.location: Central Valley (San Joaquin / Merced area) — boundaries redrawn under Prop 50 for 2026

CA-21.location: Central Valley — Fresno-area district; boundaries redrawn under Prop 50 for 2026

CA-22.location: Southern Central Valley — Kings County and parts of Kern/Tulare; redrawn under Prop 50 for 2026

CA-41.location: Riverside County — redrawn under Prop 50 for 2026

CA-45.location: Orange County area — redrawn under Prop 50 for 2026

AZ-02.location: Northeastern Arizona — Prescott, Flagstaff, and much of the Navajo Nation

FL-09.location: Orlando suburbs — Osceola County, Kissimmee, St. Cloud; boundaries redrawn for 2026

FL-13.location: Pinellas County — the St. Petersburg area; boundaries redrawn for 2026

FL-27.location: Miami-Dade County — the Miami area; boundaries redrawn for 2026

MI-07.location: Lansing–East Lansing area, plus Livingston County and part of Oakland County

MI-08.location: The Saginaw Bay region — Flint, Saginaw, Bay City, and Midland

MI-10.location: Southeastern Michigan's Macomb County — Warren and Sterling Heights, plus part of eastern Oakland County

NV-01.location: Inner Las Vegas and southeastern Clark County — Paradise, Henderson, Boulder City

NV-03.location: Western Las Vegas suburbs — Spring Valley, Summerlin South, Sandy Valley

NV-04.location: Northern Las Vegas and the Strip, plus rural central Nevada

IA-01.location: Southeastern Iowa — Davenport and Iowa City

IA-03.location: South-central Iowa — the Des Moines area

WI-01.location: Southeastern corner of Wisconsin — Kenosha, Racine, Janesville, Beloit

WI-03.location: The Driftless Area of southwestern Wisconsin — Eau Claire and La Crosse

VA-02.location: Hampton Roads — Chesapeake, Suffolk, Virginia Beach, and the Eastern Shore

VA-07.location: Northern and central Virginia — Fredericksburg, Culpeper, Spotsylvania, Stafford, Woodbridge

AK-AL.location: Statewide — Alaska's single at-large district (ranked-choice voting)

AL-02.location: Southern Alabama — Montgomery, parts of Mobile, and Tuskegee (redrawn after 2023 VRA ruling)

CO-08.location: North Denver suburbs — Adams and Weld counties, including Thornton and Greeley

ME-02.location: Northern and rural Maine — everything outside the southern coast (Bangor, Lewiston)

NC-01.location: Northeastern North Carolina — rural counties plus part of the Research Triangle; boundaries shifted ~8 pts rightward for 2026

NE-02.location: The Omaha area — all of Douglas and Saunders counties and western Sarpy County

NJ-07.location: North-central New Jersey — suburban/exurban areas across Hunterdon, Somerset, Union, Warren, and Morris counties

NM-02.location: Southern New Mexico — Las Cruces, the southern half of the state, and part of Albuquerque

OR-05.location: From southeastern Portland suburbs across the Willamette Valley and Cascades to Bend

WA-03.location: Southwestern Washington — Vancouver and the counties along the Columbia River

TX-15.location: South Texas — from the Rio Grande Valley (McAllen area) northward; redrawn for 2026

TX-23.location: West Texas — vast border district from San Antonio suburbs to El Paso; currently vacant; redrawn for 2026

TX-28.location: South Texas — Laredo and parts of San Antonio; redrawn for 2026

TX-34.location: The southern tip of Texas — Brownsville and the Gulf Coast up toward Corpus Christi; redrawn for 2026

OH-01.location: Southwestern Ohio — Cincinnati and parts of Hamilton/Warren counties; redrawn for 2026

OH-09.location: Northern Ohio along Lake Erie — Toledo eastward; redrawn for 2026

OH-13.location: Northeastern Ohio — the Akron area; redrawn for 2026
